name: Apricot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricots in water for 20 minutes.
2. In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. In another bowl, beat the maple syrup, butter, and egg until combined.
4. Drain the soaking liquid from the apricots into the orange liqueur.
5. Stir the flour mixture into the butter mixture a little at a time, alternating with the liqueur mixture.
6. Stir in the apricots and chopped pecans.
7. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 9-inch x 5-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-60 minutes.
9. The bread is done when it is golden brown and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool before cutting.
